creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
You have to bring your foodie besties to Haidilao! It’s a world-famous hotpot chain from China. 

📍 Haidilao Dubai Mall Chinatown 
💰 Approximate spend: 150 AED per person

Things to know before you go:
🥢 There’s no set menu. You have to order each hotpot ingredient. Must try are three delicacies soup base, Fortune Bag with Fishroe, and Signature beef.
🥢 They are giving away lots of freebies. Haidilao in other cities has fun secret codes to get free stuff, but those are not needed here in Dubai.
🥢 Order Haidilao-styled noodles (11 AED only) to have dancing hand pulled noodles served directly on your table.

Tag your hotpot date!
